lastAssistantMessage:
Implemented the pane visibility fix.

What changed:
- New panes now choose a split target from panes actually visible in the current tmux window, instead of blindly splitting from the last tracked pane. This prevents new panes from being created inside a hidden detached tmux window. See [paneCreation.ts](/Users/justinschroeder/Projects/dmux/.dmux/worktrees/hidden-panes/src/utils/paneCreation.ts:86).
- Layout recalculation during creation now only includes currently visible existing panes plus the new pane.
- Newly-created pane records are explicitly saved with `hidden: false`. See [paneCreation.ts](/Users/justinschroeder/Projects/dmux/.dmux/worktrees/hidden-panes/src/utils/paneCreation.ts:556).
- Added a regression test where the newest tracked pane is hidden, and creation correctly splits from the visible pane instead. See [paneLifecycle.test.ts](/Users/justinschroeder/Projects/dmux/.dmux/worktrees/hidden-panes/__tests__/integration/paneLifecycle.test.ts:415).

Verification:
- `pnpm exec vitest --run __tests__/integration/paneLifecycle.test.ts __tests__/paneVisibility.test.ts` passed.
- `pnpm run typecheck` passed.
- I also let the broader accidental Vitest run complete earlier; it passed as well.

There is an existing untracked `.codex/` directory in the worktree; I left it untouched.
